g.title: Compiler optimization that evaluates expressions with constant operands at compile-time.

ul.li: Memory Access: 2 less stack pushes/pops (No memory traffic).
ALU Usage: Calculated at compile-time (Zero CPU cycles at runtime).
Metadata: Slots marked as SLOT_CONST are eligible for further sub-expression folding.
